title: T-064 — VALIDATE CONSTRAINT audit_events_role_assigned_security_check after fresh-DB (FT-004)
prompt:
# T-064 — VALIDATE CONSTRAINT audit_events_role_assigned_security_check after fresh-DB (FT-004)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §11
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-004** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P2** (S effort)

## Goal
Promote audit_events_role_assigned_security_check from NOT VALID to VALIDATE once a fresh-DB sweep proves zero violators.

## Implementation contract
1. Add migration 026 with `ALTER TABLE audit_events VALIDATE CONSTRAINT audit_events_role_assigned_security_check`.
2. Pre-flight test asserts a fresh-DB has zero rows that would violate the constraint.
3. Post-validate test asserts the constraint shows convalidated=true in pg_constraint.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/026-validate-role-assigned-check.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/role-assigned-check.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB, when a pre-flight SELECT counts rows violating the role-assigned check, then count = 0.
2. Given migration 026 applied, when pg_constraint is inspected for the check, then convalidated = true.
3. Given an INSERT into audit_events that violates the check, when executed, then it raises an integrity error (SQLSTATE 23514).

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/role-assigned-check.test.ts asserting convalidated=true + violation rejection before migration 026 exists.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db migrate && pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test role-assigned-check`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not VALIDATE without first confirming zero violators on the target environment.
- Do not weaken the check expression.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Run VALIDATE CONSTRAINT on audit_events_role_assigned_security_check after a fresh-DB sweep confirms zero violators.
pipeline_inputs.details: T-014 shipped the CHECK constraint as NOT VALID to avoid blocking on existing rows. After a fresh-DB pass with zero violators, promote to VALIDATE so the planner treats the check as enforceable for new and existing rows.
out_of_scope: Do not touch any other audit_events CHECK constraints in this task.
